project_type: AWS CDK Python project - Event-Driven Sleep Audio Pipeline
build_system: CDK CLI (npx cdk synth) with pip for dependencies. Must unset NODE_OPTIONS env var to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js error.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions and unittest.mock for Lambda tests. Fixtures in tests/conftest.py. Coverage via pytest-cov.
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' pytest tests/ -q to confirm all tests pass. 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev --quiet. 3. Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=prod --quiet.
setup_instructions: pyenv local 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt && pip install boto3 botocore
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Must use NODE_OPTIONS='' prefix for all node/cdk commands to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js error. Python 3.11 via pyenv (pyenv local 3.11.15). boto3 must be installed separately for Lambda handler tests.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first. Write failing tests before implementation. Commit messages use conventional format (feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:). ARCHITECTURE.md is source of truth.
key_patterns: CDK stack in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py with ENV_CONFIG dict for multi-environment. Tests use template fixture from conftest.py. Lambda handler in lambda/sleep_audio_processor/handler.py. State machine definition tested by parsing JSON definition string from synthesized template.
directory_structure: Root: app.py (CDK entry), cdk.json, requirements*.txt. cdk_base/: CDK stack definitions. lambda/sleep_audio_processor/: Lambda handler code. tests/unit/: All test files. .github/workflows/: CI config.
